sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110017" key="u(yo/fqalmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑψ-όφθαλμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n110017.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with prominent eyes,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:230" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Par.Ptol.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">230</biblScope> </bibl> (s. v. l., <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ῥιψ-</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> </bibl> </cit>)</sense> </entryFree>
